title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 4.4%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: The soft left in Labour is an amorphous beast and although Burnham probably has the support of the majority, there is absolutely no consensus on what to do if Streeting challenges. 

Some prefer Rayner, some Miliband,...
